_note: Canonical reference data for Lucid Tuner. This is the single source of truth. Update here — never edit inline copies in task prompts.
_version: 2.0 — echo_filename moved to tuning_key level; duplicates resolved; all keys Canon-verified

tuning_keys.quote: We dance with what's around us / There's a flow that has us in tow, holding us in its embrace
Harmony will start to overflow creating an eternal link
Release attachments to outcomes we've drawn / The schemas we're tied to turn us into pawns
Allow your mind to be refined / Cleared and realigned / For silence stirs to unwind / All the thoughts intertwined
A resolution requires faith in somethin
Live life awake to see what really matters
Freedom is undefined... Because it's a state of mind
No one can tell you what it means because it's a state of mind
Rivers flow to and fro, forces nudge the waters so they go where they're told / The waters are free but controlled
Change is a constant no matter the time of year / But higher things are at work so have no fear
The only moment that exists just slipped into the past / So don't just let another pass you by
If you want to capitalize on this experience / Observe what is happening right now
One thing I know is time's not moving slow / As I try to go with the flow
We don't get to decide what will be on the other side / But I want to know I tried / As I move past the passing tide
Life ends like a thief in the night... No escaping this birthright / We will be heading toward the light
We move on to the next plight, we live then assess our life / This may excite or fright / But it goes on so we'll be alright
The observer will endure
As I walk through the valley of shadows I will fear no evil
Validity is transformed by what we see / Through fractured objectivity
The credibility of what we know / Strains for authenticity
Often is heard 'I know what you mean' / Determined with sight unseen / Of my life through my eyes / On my holographic screen
In the beginning our worldview is new... Sketches of belief ensue
My vision strains to see quite right / As I navigate through darkness and light
Binary and bio, it's off or it's on / Duality is our causal liaison
Wisdom must be acquired before it is known
Allow your mind to be refined / Cleared and realigned / For silence stirs to unwind / All the thoughts intertwined
Science says give us one miracle And we'll explain the rest / So they test and make an educated guess
We swing around on frayed strings of misconceptions / We only feel what connects with our perceptions
Freedom is undefined... Because it's a state of mind
The past gives us a review, our version of what we've gone through / But even our point of view is skewed with contrasting hues
So we look to beyond our conscious mind to the inner voice
Now won't you come and listen to me / I'll show you things that you never have seen
The absolute truth is hidden by design
All events can be seen from different sides / The ones in power decide how they guide
Factions are trying to control your thoughts by planting concepts in a clean & tidy box
So you should always look between the f'ing lines
I wake up most days with feelings inside, torn apart to find what makes sense
Between every thought are infinite possibilities / In each instant you decide the way that life proceeds
What I thought I knew did not ring true / My faith was distorting my view
Many times we think that we have it all figured out, we find we were wrong from square one
Our brains are trained to avoid pain and seek pleasure / As we progress we devise a standard, adapting it to our pattern
Down to our cells we have to learn how to discern / Structure emerging from the random forming like crystals in a cavern
I don't know why I can't see what's in front of me / So I try to recognize the signs that appear by design
The way information is processed in our field of vision
We live life the best we can but what does that mean / We've been programmed like a machine
So wake up to see the plan / It's not as it may seem / For most it goes on unseen
I look out from behind these eyes / Seeking out something true that's been hidden from view
There are cycles that repeat themselves, we have been told lies / Our true history has been disguised
The winners are who foretells what tomorrow knows / They choose what to disclose
We affect how we behave but I know that I am a slave / To the chemicals coursing through my veins, concocted by firings in my brain
We survive through fight or flight / Choices based on wrong or right
Moments transform into years bringing joy and causing tears
Subtle sparks can be sensed between our thoughts / It's where the truth lies but awareness can't be bought
Choices arrive like the rising sun or in the shadows cast by the mountains
Thoughts become real, they impact the quantum field / Vibrations interacting to reveal
Consciousness is not bound orchestrating a symphony of light and sound / We look for what we've found our awareness training ground
Matter is energy condensed by activity / Requiring a foundation to reach each degree
Truth is a concept that requires immense faith / In what we think we know to be true
Most evidence is subjective and dependent on our view
It's the intent that determines whether honesty is concerned
Tune your mind with reflection / Use your attention with intention / Imagine what it is you want / If you're clear, it will appear
Our thoughts create our world / Contrary to what you may have heard / Your mind's power is so strong / Just by thinking you will affect the outcome
Reaction is the result of action / The vibrations impact energy patterns / They crash around like waves, influencing the way we behave
This world is moving so fast / The chaos seems to cast a web of confusion / Blocking us all from sound conclusions
I look through the lens of what I believe / And see what I see as best I conceive
But blindness forms clouds that deceive / Distracting me from what I want to achieve
I can see through those that want to cause fear / When they're spewing out hate and grinding our gears
We see the world through our own set of eyes / Our point of view is where the secret lies
The core difference between me and you is our experiences that separate us into unique perspectives for choosing the best route
If we spend our time on actions that fulfill us, that fill us with joy
Let your Self go and feel how to grow / Let your heart keep you in sync
Silhouettes of fulfillment keep me trudging along
Life is full of endless dreams / With potential to come true / But not without attention from you
If your days feel like deja vu it's time to pass through into the unknown
Every day can be new if you choose
I talk of ignorance, I talk of greed / Hear my words if you hunger to be free
So you can create or destroy
Reaching the outcome that we desire teeters on a wire
As I look into the future I know we don't want the same again
So wake up to see the plan
Gotta do what needs to be done / The Mirage is ridin' on the sun
We arrive as a spark of light with a story yet to write
You hold the power to be alive

Thoughts become real, they impact the quantum field / Vibrations interacting to reveal
Awakening in our dreams to become lucid in this state of being creates a stream

Our thoughts create our world... Just by thinking you will affect the outcome
You know you know this so get up and shout / That's what life is about
Our life begins before we appear / We have a purpose for which to persevere
So don't miss good things being controlled by fear / Alter your routine so you can steer

The road is lined with guides and signs to lead us on our way

I hope to find someone that joins me, that sees me as one of their life's joys

Reaching the outcome that we desire teeters on a wire / Engulfed in madness as we perspire staring at the fire

Premonitions and harbingers, they serve to protect
